issues.description: AttachDon action missing target filter for {Sky Island} type. Card text specifies 'to 1 of your {Sky Island} type Leader or Character cards' but DSL has generic ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader without type restriction.

Second effect (Trigger with HasCardOnBoard condition) is not present in card text. Official text only describes main effect: Draw 1 + optionally attach 1 rested DON to Sky Island character/leader. The DrawCard count 2 and separate trigger are fabricated.
AttachDon specifies count:1 but card says 'up to 1 rested DON' - rested state constraint missing from action parameters.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] Draw 1 card. Then, give up to 1 rested DON!! card to 1 of your {Sky Island} type Leader or Character cards.
